title: Gradient Descent Optimization Flowchart
description: A visual representation of the iterative process of using the gradient of the Mean Squared Error (MSE) to optimize model parameters.
relationships: Parameters are used to make Predictions
Predictions and True Values (y) are used to calculate MSE
MSE is differentiated to compute its Gradient with respect to parameters
Gradient and Learning Rate (α) are used to Update Parameters
Process repeats until Convergence Criteria are met
